# paragraphs

Paragraph collection with Run element.

# paragraphs.ParagraphCollection { #hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.ParagraphCollection }

```python
collections.paragraphs.ParagraphCollection(app)
```

``doc.paragraphs`` — ordinal-access paragraph collection.

Iteration uses ``Section(0).Paragraph(i)`` on the active HWP
document. When the underlying handle can't enumerate (e.g. no
document open), the collection behaves as empty.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [names](#hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.ParagraphCollection.names) | Ordinal strings — paragraphs have no intrinsic names. |

### names { #hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.ParagraphCollection.names }

```python
collections.paragraphs.ParagraphCollection.names()
```

Ordinal strings — paragraphs have no intrinsic names.

# paragraphs.Paragraph { #hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.Paragraph }

```python
collections.paragraphs.Paragraph(app, index, raw=None)
```

Value object for a single paragraph (ordinal only).

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [charshape](#hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.Paragraph.charshape) | :class:`~hwpapi.low.parametersets.CharShape` snapshot for this |
| [parashape](#hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.Paragraph.parashape) | :class:`~hwpapi.low.parametersets.ParaShape` snapshot for this |
| [runs](#hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.Paragraph.runs) | Runs covering this paragraph. Phase 4 returns a single-element |
| [style](#hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.Paragraph.style) | Paragraph style name (e.g. "바탕글"). Empty string on failure. |
| [text](#hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.Paragraph.text) | Paragraph text. Returns ``""`` when the backend cannot resolve it. |

# paragraphs.Run { #hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.Run }

```python
collections.paragraphs.Run(paragraph, start=0, end=-1)
```

A run — contiguous slice of a :class:`Paragraph` sharing a
:class:`~hwpapi.low.parametersets.CharShape`.

Phase 4 ships a single-run stub covering the whole paragraph; a
future phase can split on CharShape boundaries by walking the
characters.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name       | Type      | Description                                                                                                        | Default    |
|------------|-----------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| paragraph  | Paragraph | Owning paragraph value object.                                                                                     | _required_ |
| start      | int       | Character offsets into :attr:`Paragraph.text` (Python slice semantics). ``end == -1`` means "to end of paragraph". | `0`        |
| end        | int       | Character offsets into :attr:`Paragraph.text` (Python slice semantics). ``end == -1`` means "to end of paragraph". | `0`        |
| Attributes |           |                                                                                                                    | _required_ |
| not        |           |                                                                                                                    | _required_ |

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [charshape](#hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.Run.charshape) | Best-effort :class:`CharShape` — currently the paragraph's. |
| [paragraph](#hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.Run.paragraph) | The :class:`Paragraph` this run belongs to. |
| [text](#hwpapi.collections.paragraphs.Run.text) | Substring of the paragraph text covered by this run. |
